summary: All 7 gaps identified, no hard external blockers for P0. Key gaps: docker-compose.yml missing (uses existing Dockerfiles), runbook missing (pure docs), no rate-limiting middleware (tower-governor dep needed), no Prometheus metrics or OTLP spans, security headers not set (Tower SetResponseHeaderLayer needed), no cargo bench or k6 scripts, no staging compose/deploy. Optimal order: G1+G2+G3 in parallel (P0), then G5+G6-bench in parallel, then G4, then G7.
